query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (setting_key, setting_value) VALUES 
('pay_on_pickup_enabled', 'true'),
('max_pay_on_pickup_amount', '30')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value = VALUES(setting_value);
